import React, { Component } from 'react' // import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import "./PostWindow.css" import MAIN from '../Main/Main' export default class PostWindow extends Component { render() { const {id_post} = useParams() const { title, text, img, id, link, author, tags } = this.props.listId const { titleL, textL, imgL, idL, linkL, authorL, tagsL } = this.props.list return (
{author}
{title}
{text}
{tags}
) } } // listVisible={this.props.listVisible}
